title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jubilant FoodWorks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jubilant FoodWorks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks:
Jubilant FoodWorks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks!
